tracks.meaning: the act of performing physical activity or movements for fitness, health, or training purposes
a training maneuver or simulated operation conducted by military personnel or forces
the formal use or practice of a legal right, power, or procedure
a therapeutic activity or treatment designed to improve physical function or health
a task or activity performed to develop mental skills, discipline, or emotional control
a formal written or spoken composition created to demonstrate skill or test knowledge
the performance of religious duties, rituals, or the practice of a faith tradition
an activity or situation that tests one's patience, skills, or endurance
